name: @xn-intenton-z2a/plot-code-lib
description: Transform mathematical expressions into beautiful SVG and PNG plots - the jq of formula visualizations. CLI tool and JavaScript library.

scripts.build: echo "Nothing to build - pure JavaScript library"
scripts.demo:sine: node src/lib/main.js plot --expression 'sin(x)' --range 'x=-10:10' --file examples/demo_sine_quick.svg --title 'Quick Demo: sin(x)'
scripts.demo:png: node src/lib/main.js plot --expression 'x^2' --range 'x=-3:3' --file examples/demo_quad_quick.png --title 'Quick Demo: x²'
scripts.showcase: npm run examples && echo 'Generated comprehensive examples in examples/ directory'
